name: Disruptor
description: By stormcraft, I shall lay my enemies low.

abilities.name: Electromagnetic Repulsion
abilities.description: Damages and knocks all enemy units back within the radius, whenever the Stormcrafter accumulates a certain amount of damage taken.

abilities.name: Thunder Strike
abilities.description: Disruptor's charged coils occasionally overload, and a singed armor plate or tuft of fur is the enemy's result.

abilities.name: Glimpse
abilities.description: Teleports the target hero back to where it was a few seconds ago. Deals damage to the affected enemy hero corresponding to its teleported distance as soon as it appears at the marked location.

abilities.name: Kinetic Field
abilities.description: After a short formation time, creates a circular barrier of kinetic energy that manipulates affected enemy's movement speed to point where they cannot pass.

abilities.name: Kinetic Fence
abilities.description: After a short formation time, creates a wall-barrier of kinetic energy that slows enemy units down to the point where they cannot pass through it. Immediately removes the debuff and does not reapply the debuff on enemy units.

abilities.name: Static Storm
abilities.description: Creates a damaging static storm that also silences all enemy units in the area for the duration. The damage starts off weak, but gradually increases in power over the duration.
